name: DeepCool CC560 WH V2 Mid-Tower Computer Case - Tempered Glass Window - 4x 120mm LED Fans - Support Fans on the PSU Shroud - Top Panel Magnetic Dust Filter - USB 3.0 - USB 2.0 - Headphone/Mic Combo Jack (R-CC560-WHGAA4-G-2)
